title: Manual ordering of boards on list view (and other widgets)

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the List View widget, it is not possible to manually reorder connected boards. Once boards are connected, their order is automatically set and cannot be changed. This limitation becomes especially problematic when using Group by Board, as the board order directly affects how items are displayed.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to manually control the order of boards in the List View widget. This would allow higher-priority boards to appear first, improving clarity and usability—especially when boards are grouped—so teams can more easily focus on what matters most.
